explanation: 다양한 변형을 지원하는 버튼 컴포넌트입니다.
상태, 카테고리, 기술 스택을 표시하는 작은 뱃지 컴포넌트입니다.
로딩 상태를 나타내는 스피너 컴포넌트입니다.
콘텐츠 로드 전 레이아웃을 보여주는 플레이스홀더입니다.

css: .btn{display:inline-flex; align-items:center;gap:.5rem;padding:.62rem 1.35rem;border-radius:8px;font-family:'Noto Sans KR',sans-serif;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:500;cursor:pointer;border:none;transition:.2s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;left:0;margin-left:10px}.btn-p{background:var(--text3);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(69,94,254,.3)} .btn-sm{padding:.38rem .85rem;font-size:.73rem} .btn-lg{padding:.82rem 1.9rem;font-size:.88rem} .btn-d{background:rgba(255,107,157,.12);color:var(--accent2);border:1px solid rgba(255,107,157,.3)} .btn-g{background:var(--text);color:var(--text2)} .btn-o{background:0 0;color:var(--text);border:1px solid var(--border)} .btn-ic{width:34px;height:34px;padding:0;justify-content:center} .btn-e{width:auto;height:34px;padding:0 5px;justify-content:center}

.badge_wrap { margin-bottom: 20px; } .bs-purple { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; } .bdg { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 0.25rem 0.7rem; border-radius: 100px; font-weight: 500; } .bs-pink { background: var(--accent2); color: #fff; } .bs-teal { background: var(--accent3); color: #000; } .bs-yellow { background: var(--yellow); color: #000; } .bo-purple { background: rgba(124, 111, 255, 0.12); color: var(--accent); border: 1px solid rgba(124, 111, 255, 0.35); } .bo-pink { background: rgba(255, 107, 157, 0.12); color: var(--accent2); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 107, 157, 0.35); } .bo-teal { background: rgba(0, 229, 192, 0.1); color: var(--accent3); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 229, 192, 0.3); } .bdg-dot::before { content: ''; display: inline-block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; margin-right: 0.32rem; vertical-align: middle; } .bdg-live { color: var(--accent3); background: rgba(0, 229, 192, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 229, 192, 0.3); } .bdg-beta { color: var(--yellow); background: rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.1); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 209, 102, 0.3); }

[class^=spin-] { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; display: block; } .spinner_wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-direction: column; } .spin-s1 { border: 3px solid var(--border); border-top-color: var(--accent); animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; } .spin-s2 { background-color: var(--accent); animation: pul 0.8s linear infinite; } .spin-s3 { position: relative; border: 3px solid var(--border); } .spin-s3::after, .spin-s3::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: -3px; top: -3px; width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; border: 3px solid transparent; border-top-color: var(--accent); animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; } .spin-s3::before { content: ''; animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite reverse; border-top-color: var(--accent3); } .spin-s4 { position: relative; width: 34px; height: 34px; animation: spin 1.5s linear infinite; } .spin-s4 .dot { position: absolute; top: 14px; left: 14px; width: 5px; height: 5px; background-color: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; animation: opc 0.8s linear infinite; transform-origin: center; } .spin-s4 .dot:nth-child(1) { transform: rotate(0deg) translateY(-14px); animation-delay: 0s; } =.spin-s4 .dot:nth-child(2) { transform: rotate(36deg) translateY(-14px); animation-delay: 0.5s; } .spin-s4 .dot:nth-child(3) { transform: rotate(72deg) translateY(-14px); animation-delay: 1s; } .spin-s4 .dot:nth-child(4) { transform: rotate(108deg) translateY(-14px); animation-delay: 1.5s; } .spin-s4 .dot:nth-child(5) { transform: rotate(144deg) translateY(-14px); animation-delay: 2s; } .spin-s4 .dot:nth-child(6) { transform: rotate(180deg) translateY(-14px); animation-delay: 2.5s; } .spin-s4 .dot:nth-child(7) { transform: rotate(216deg) translateY(-14px); animation-delay: 3s; } .spin-s4 .dot:nth-child(8) { transform: rotate(252deg) translateY(-14px); animation-delay: 3.5s; } .spin-s4 .dot:nth-child(9) { transform: rotate(288deg) translateY(-14px); animation-delay: 4s; } .spin-s4 .dot:nth-child(10) { transform: rotate(324deg) translateY(-14px); animation-delay: 4.5s; }

.skel { background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--border) 25%, var(--border2) 50%, var(--border) 75%); background-size: 200% 100%; animation: sk 1.4s infinite; } .skel_wrap { display: flex; gap: 10px; align-items: center; } .skel_wrap + .skel_wrap + .skel_wrap { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; } .skel_wrap + .skel_wrap + .skel_wrap > .skel { height: 9px; width: 100%; border-radius: 8px; } .skel_wrap + .skel_wrap + .skel_wrap > .skel:nth-of-type(2) { height: 9px; width: 80%; } .skel_wrap .circle { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 44px; flex-shrink: 0; } .skel_wrap .ner { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; } .skel_wrap .ner > .sk { display: block; height: 11px; width: 55%; border-radius: 5px; } .skel_wrap .ner > .sk:nth-of-type(2) { height: 9px; width: 38%; } .skel_wrap.skel { width: 100%; height: 90px; border-radius: 9px; }

explanation: 오버레이 위에 표시되는 다이얼로그 컴포넌트입니다.
화면 우측 하단에 나타나는 알림 컴포넌트입니다.
마우스 올리면 추가 정보를 보여주는 CSS Only 컴포넌트입니다.
알림 개수 배지와 드롭다운 목록을 가진 컴포넌트입니다.

html:
5년 실무 경력 ★★★★★
실무 4년 이상 ★★★★☆
현재 학습중 ★★☆☆☆

알림

  • 새 매시지가 도착했어요.
    방금 전

  • 프로젝트 승인됐어요
    5주 전

  • 코드 리뷰 요청
    1시간 전
css: .tip_box { position: absolute; bottom: calc(100% + 7px); left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(4px); background: var(--bg4); border: 1px solid var(--border2); color: var(--white); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; padding: 0.38rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 6px; white-space: nowrap; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity 0.18s, transform 0.18s; z-index: 40; } .tip_box::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); border: 5px solid transparent; border-top-color: var(--bg4); } .tip_wrap { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin-top: 20px; } .tip_wrap:hover .tip_box { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); }

.noti_wrap .btn { width: 42px; height: 42px; padding: 0px; font-size: 1.2rem; text-align: center; justify-content: center; overflow: unset; color: var(--yellow); position: relative; } .noti_wrap .btn::before { content: attr(data-count); position: absolute; top: -8px; right: -8px; color: var(--white); font-size: 0.7rem; text-align: center; line-height: 1.4; background: var(--accent2); width: 17px; height: 17px; border-radius: 50%; } .alert_box { width: 250px; background: var(--bg3); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 11px; overflow: hidden; display: none; z-index: 40; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 8px 24px; } .alert_box .alert_head { padding: 0.7rem 0.9rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--text); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text2); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; } .alert_box .alert_head .read_btn { border: 0px; background: transparent; color: var(--accent); cursor: pointer; font-weight: 400; } .alert_box .alert_body li { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.7rem; padding: 0.7rem 0.9rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--text); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.12s; } .alert_box .alert_body li:last-child { border-bottom: 0px; } .alert_box .alert_body li::before { content: ''; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 7px; background-color: var(--accent); display: block; margin-top: 10px; } .alert_box .alert_body li p { color: var(--white); } .alert_box .alert_body li p .year_alert { font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--text); }

explanation: 콘텐츠를 탭으로 구분해 보여주는 컴포넌트입니다.
현재 위치를 계층적으로 표시하는 네비게이션입니다.
대량 데이터를 페이지로 나눠 탐색하는 컴포넌트입니다.
접기/펼치기 가능한 사이드바 네비게이션입니다.
다단계 프로세스 진행 상태를 표시하는 컴포넌트입니다.

  • 모노브레인 (2024~2025) · 메타록 (2022~2023) · 한뜻 (2020~2021)

css: .tab_content { width: 100%; max-width: 440px; } .tab_content .tab_list_btn { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 1.1rem; } .tab_content .tab_list_btn .tab_btn { padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem; background: none; border: none; font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; position: relative; transition: color 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; } .tab_content .tab_list_btn .tab_btn:hover { color: var(--text3); } .tab_content .tab_list_btn .tab_btn:after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -1px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background: var(--accent); transform: scaleX(0); transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .tab_content .tab_list_btn .tab_btn.active { color: var(--text3); } .tab_content .tab_list_btn .tab_btn.active:after { transform: scaleX(1); } .tab_content .tab_list_cont .tab_cont { display: none; font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text2); line-height: 1.8; animation: fadeup 0.3s ease; } .tab_content .tab_list_cont .tab_cont.active { display: block; }

.bor { list-style: none; display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.2rem; margin-bottom: 10px; } .bor .bor-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.2rem; font-size: 0.78rem; } .bor .bor-item .bor-link { color: var(--text2); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s; } .bor .bor-item .bor-link.bcr-active { color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; } .bor .bor-item::after { content: '>'; color: var(--text2); margin-left: 0.2rem; } .bor .bor-item:last-child::after { content: ''; } .bor .bor-item.bor-active { color: var(--text); font-weight: 500; }

.sidebar_wrap { display: flex; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 11px; overflow: hidden; min-height: 190px; } .sidebar_wrap #sd { width: 175px; border-right: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 0.7rem; transition: width 0.28s; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; } .sidebar_wrap #sd .sd_head { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; } .sidebar_wrap #sd .sd_head .tit { font-weight: bold; } .sidebar_wrap #sd .sd_head .sd_btn { background: transparent; padding: 0px; } .sidebar_wrap #sd .sd_head .sd_btn::after { width: 44px; } .sidebar_wrap #sd .sd_item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.55rem; padding: 0.45rem 0.65rem; border-radius: 7px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text2); transition: all 0.12s; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; } .sidebar_wrap #sd .sd_item:hover, .sidebar_wrap #sd .sd_item.active { color: var(--text3); background-color: var(--bg2); font-weight: bold; } .sidebar_wrap #sd.active { width: 60px; } .sidebar_wrap #sd.active .tit { display: none; } .sidebar_wrap #sd.active .sd_head { justify-content: center; } .sidebar_wrap .alert { flex: 1; padding: 1rem; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text2); display: flex; align-items: center; }

.step__wrap { width: 100%; max-width: 460px; } #stepper { display: flex; } .step_node { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; flex: 1; position: relative; } .step_node.done .step-line::after { width: 100%; } .step_node.done .step-c { background-color: var(--accent3); } .step-c { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(--border2); background: var(--bg2); color: var(--text3); font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.28s; z-index: 1; } .step-c.active { background: var(--text3); color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(124, 111, 255, 0.38); } .step-lbl { font-size: 0.58rem; color: var(--text); white-space: nowrap; } .step-line { position: absolute; top: 15px; left: calc(50% + 15px); right: calc(-50% + 15px); height: 2px; background: var(--border); z-index: 0; transition: background 0.28s; } .step-line::after { content: ''; background: var(--accent3); width: 0px; display: block; height: 2px; } .step-content { background: var(--bg2); border-radius: 9px; padding: 1rem; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text2); min-height: 52px; line-height: 1.8; margin-top: 0.85rem; margin-bottom: 0.85rem; } .button_wrap { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 10px; } .button_wrap .btn { background: transparent; } .button_wrap .btn:hover { background: var(--bg2); color: var(--text3); font-weight: bold; }

explanation: max-height 트릭으로 구현한 부드러운 아코디언입니다.
Transform 기반 슬라이드 캐러셀, 자동재생 + 도트 인디케이터.
IntersectionObserver로 뷰포트 진입 시 채워지는 프로그레스바입니다.
마우스 위치를 추적해 빛이 따라오는 인터랙티브 카드입니다.
CSS Transform만으로 구현한 이미지 줌 호버 효과입니다.

html:
🎨HTML/CSS 퍼블리싱
시맨틱 마크업,BEM방법론,SCSS,Flexbox/Grid 레이아웃 반응형 퍼블리싱.
⚡JavaScript/jQuery
DOM제어,이벤트 처리,Ajax 통신,jQuery 플러그인 커스터마이징 4년 이상 경험.
✨GSAP 애니메이션
ScrollTrigger,Timeline,Stagger를 활용한 인터랙티브 웹 애니메이션 구현.

< !-- 막대 프레스바 -->

Progress Bar _ var1

  • HTML / CSS98%
  • jQuery88%
  • JavaScript72%
  • React25%

  • 98%
  • 78%
  • 55%

⚡퍼블리싱HTML/CSS/SCSS 시맨틱 마크업+반응형
✨애니메이션GSAP ScrollTrigger 인터랙션
🎨디자인Figma / Photoshop / Illustrator

• 🎨퍼블리싱
  • ⚡JavaScript
  • ✨GSAP
css: .acc { width: 100%; max-width: 440px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .acc-item { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 9px; overflow: hidden; } .acc-item.open .acc_body, .acc-item:hover .acc_body { max-height: 180px; padding: 0.85rem 1rem; } .acc-item.open .ac_icon, .acc-item:hover .ac_icon { transform: rotate(180deg); color: var(--accent); } .acc_hd { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0.8rem 1rem; cursor: pointer; background: var(--text5); font-size: 0.83rem; font-weight: 500; -webkit-user-select: none; -moz-user-select: none; user-select: none; transition: background 0.15s; } .acc_hd .ac_icon { width: 19px; height: 19px; border-radius: 5px; background: var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--text2); transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.2, 0.64, 1), background 0.2s; flex-shrink: 0; } .acc_body { max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height 0.35s ease, padding 0.35s ease; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text2); line-height: 1.8; padding: 0 1rem; background: var(--white); }

.carousel_wrap { width: 100%; max-width: 440px; } .carousel_wrap .carousel { position: relative; width: 100%; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 9px; } .carousel_wrap .carousel .carousel_tark { display: flex; transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transform: translateX(0%); } .carousel_wrap .carousel .carousel_tark .carousel_list { min-width: 100%; height: 130px; color: var(--white); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 9px; } .carousel_wrap .carousel .carousel_btn_wrap { display: flex; } .carousel_wrap .carousel .carousel_btn_wrap button[class*=btn] { position: absolute; right: 7px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); border: 1px solid var(--border2); color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; } .carousel_wrap .carousel .carousel_btn_wrap button i { color: var(--white); } .carousel_wrap .carousel .carousel_btn_wrap .prev_btn { left: 7px; } .carousel_wrap .car-dots { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 5px; margin-top: 0.65rem; } .carousel_wrap .car-dots .dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--bg4); transition: 0.28s; cursor: pointer; } .carousel_wrap .car-dots .dot.d_pick { width: 18px; background: var(--accent); }

.card-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 0.85rem; width: 100%; } .card-grid .h-card { background: var(--text5); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 11px; padding: 1.1rem; --mx: 50%; --my: 50%; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .card-grid .h-card:hover { border-color: rgba(124, 111, 255, 0.3); transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28); } .card-grid .h-card:hover::after { opacity: 1; background: radial-gradient(circle at var(--mx, 50%) var(--my, 50%), rgb(0, 255, 255) 0%, transparent 60%); } .card-grid .h-card .hc-icon { font-size: 1.4rem; margin-bottom: 0.65rem; } .card-grid .h-card .hc-title { font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .card-grid .h-card .hc-desc { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text2); line-height: 1.65; } .card-grid .h-card span { display: block; } .card-grid .h-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(circle at var(--mx, 50%) var(--my, 50%), rgba(58, 58, 58, 0.12) 0%, transparent 60%); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s; }

.var-row { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .iz-wrap { width: 115px; height: 115px; border-radius: 11px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; cursor: zoom-in; } .iz-wrap:hover .iz-inner { transform: scale(2.14); } .iz-wrap:hover .iz-ov { opacity: 1; } .iz-wrap .iz-inner { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00e5c0, #7c6fff); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 2.5rem; width: 100%; height: 100%; transition: transform 0.38s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .iz-wrap .iz-ov { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.48); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.28s; }
javascript: const cardes=document.querySelectorAll('.h-card'); cardes.forEach((card)=> { card.addEventListener('mousemove', function (e) { e.preventDefault(); const r=this.getBoundingClientRect(); this.style.setProperty('--mx', Math.ceil((e.clientX - r.left) / r.width * 100) + '%'); this.style.setProperty('--my', Math.ceil((e.clientY - r.top) / r.height * 100) + '%'); } ) } )

explanation: 실시간 유효성 검증을 지원하는 인풋 컴포넌트입니다.
JavaScript 없이 CSS만으로 동작하는 토글 스위치입니다.
외부 클릭으로 자동 닫히는 드롭다운 컴포넌트입니다.
입력값 매칭 + 하이라이트 실시간 자동완성 컴포넌트입니다.
클릭으로 선택/해제하는 다중 선택 칩 필터입니다.
호버 미리보기 + 클릭 확정 별점 컴포넌트입니다.
드래그 앤 드롭 + 클릭 파일 선택 컴포넌트입니다.

css: #forminput_wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.85rem; max-width: 340px; } #forminput_wrap .fi-group { width: 100%; max-width: 360px; height: 90px; } #forminput_wrap .fi-group .fi-label { display: block; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text2); margin-bottom: 0.38rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; } #forminput_wrap .fi-group .fi-msg { font-size: 0.68rem; margin-top: 0.35rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem; } #forminput_wrap .fi-group .fi-msg.s { color: var(--accent3); } #forminput_wrap .fi-group .fi-msg.e { color: var(--accent2); } #forminput_wrap .fi-group .fi { width: 100%; padding: 0.65rem 0.95rem; border: 1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: 7px; color: var(--text); font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s; } #forminput_wrap .fi-group .fi.err { border-color: var(--accent2); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255, 107, 157, 0.1); } #forminput_wrap .fi-group .fi.ok { border-color: var(--accent3); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 229, 192, 0.1); } #forminput_wrap button.btn { justify-content: center; } #forminput_wrap button:disabled { background: var(--text4); opacity: 0.5; }

#togglesw_wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.85rem; } #togglesw_wrap .togglesw { opacity: 0; z-index: 99; position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; } #togglesw_wrap .togglesw:checked + .sw { transform: translateX(20px); } #togglesw_wrap .togglesw-label { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text2); } #togglesw_wrap .togglesw-group { position: relative; height: 24px; cursor: pointer; width: 100%; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; } #togglesw_wrap .check_wrap { inset: 0; border-radius: 100px; background: var(--bg2); width: 44px; border: 1px solid var(--border2); box-shadow: inset 0px 2px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35); transition: background 0.22s, border-color 0.22s; position: relative; } #togglesw_wrap .check_wrap .sw { display: block; position: absolute; top: 3px; left: 3px; width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--text3); transition: transform 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35); }

.dd_wrap { position: relative; display: inline-block; } .dd_wrap.open .dd_menu { transform: scaleY(1) translateY(0); opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; } .dd_wrap.open i { transform: rotate(180deg); transform-origin: center 9px; } .dd_wrap .dd_btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.62rem 1rem; border-radius: 7px; border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text); font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; -webkit-user-select: none; -moz-user-select: none; user-select: none; min-width: 155px; justify-content: space-between; } .dd_wrap .dd_btn i { font-size: 0.9rem; transition: transform 0.22s; margin-bottom: 5px; } .dd_wrap .dd_menu { position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 5px); left: 0; min-width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 9px; overflow: hidden; z-index: 50; transform-origin: top; transform: scaleY(0.88) translateY(-5px); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: transform 0.22s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), opacity 0.16s; } .dd_wrap .dd_menu .dd_item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.55rem; padding: 0.55rem 0.9rem; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text2); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); transition: background 0.12s; }

.search_wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 340px; } .search_wrap .fi { width: 100%; padding: 0.65rem 0.95rem; border: 1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: 7px; color: var(--text); font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s; } .search_wrap .ac-list { position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 4px); left: 0; right: 0; background-color: var(--bg2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 7px; overflow: hidden; display: none; z-index: 30; } .search_wrap .ac-list .ac-hl { color: var(--text3); font-weight: bold; } .search_wrap .ac-list .ac-item { padding: 0.55rem 0.9rem; font-size: 0.8rem; cursor: pointer; color: var(--text2); transition: background 0.12s; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }

.chip_wrap .chip_list { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.45rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .chip_wrap .chip_list .chip-item { font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.32rem 0.8rem; border-radius: 100px; border: 1.5px solid var(--border); color: var(--text3); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.18s; -webkit-user-select: none; -moz-user-select: none; user-select: none; } .chip_wrap .chip_list .chip-item.sel { background: rgba(70, 95, 255, 0.2941176471); border-color: var(--text3); color: var(--text3); } .chip_wrap .chip-result { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text3); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-weight: bold; }

.file_form { width: 100%; max-width: 360px; height: 115px; border: 2px dashed var(--border); border-radius: 11px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.45rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .file_form .file-icon { font-size: 1.7rem; font-style: normal; } .file_form .alert { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text2); } .file_form .file-type { font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--text3); } .file_form input { display: none; } .fi-list { width: 100%; max-width: 360px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.35rem; margin-top: 0.5rem; } .fi-list .fi-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.42rem 0.65rem; background: var(--bg2); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 7px; font-size: 0.75rem; } .fi-list .fi-item .fi-name { flex: 1; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .fi-list .fi-item .fi-size { color: var(--text3); font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.65rem; } .fi-list .fi-item .fi-close { cursor: pointer; color: var(--text); } .file-score { width: 360px; text-align: center; font-size: 0.78rem; margin-bottom: 10px; color: var(--text2); } .file-score .num { color: var(--text3); font-weight: bold; }

explanation: +/- 버튼과 숫자 카운트업 애니메이션을 지원합니다.
시작/정지/리셋 가능한 카운트다운 타이머입니다.
Clipboard API를 활용한 원클릭 복사 컴포넌트입니다.
페이지 스크롤 진행률을 상단 바로 보여주는 컴포넌트입니다.

css: .counter_wrap { text-align: center; height: 137px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; } .co { display: flex; height: 83px; align-items: center; gap: 0.45rem; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 0.4rem; } .co button { width: 26px; height: 26px; padding: 0px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .co .counter_text { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 1.9rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); min-width: 54px; text-align: center; transition: color 0.2s, transform 0.15s; display: inline-block; } .cut_ani { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .cut_ani .cut { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 1.9rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent3); margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }

.timer_wrap { text-align: center; } .timer_wrap #timer_num { width: 300px; width: 231px; margin-bottom: 20px; padding: 0.65rem 0.95rem; border: 1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: 7px; color: var(--text); font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif; font-size: 0.82rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.18s, box-shadow 0.18s; } .time_wrap { margin-bottom: 20px; } .time_wrap .ci { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 3.5rem; color: var(--text3); padding-bottom: 0.75rem; } .time_wrap span { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text3); background: var(--bg2); padding: 0.45rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9px; min-width: 68px; display: inline-block; } .button_wrap { display: flex; gap: 0.45rem; justify-content: center; }

.clip_wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.65rem; width: 100%; max-width: 360px; } .clip_wrap .cp-code_wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.55rem; width: 100%; } .clip_wrap .cp-code_wrap .cp-code { flex: 1; font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text3); background: var(--bg2); padding: 0.45rem 0.7rem; border-radius: 6px; max-width: 292px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid var(--border); } .clip_wrap .cp-code_wrap .code-btn { padding: 0.42rem 0.85rem; border-radius: 6px; width: 58px; border: 1px solid var(--border); background: transparent; color: var(--text2); font-size: 0.7rem; cursor: pointer; justify-content: center; transition: all 0.18s; white-space: nowrap; } .clip_wrap .cp-code_wrap .code-btn:hover, .clip_wrap .cp-code_wrap .code-btn.show { color: var(--white); background: var(--text3); }

.scroll__wrap { position: relative; } .scroll_bar { position: absolute; top: -5px; left: 0px; width: 0; height: 5px; max-width: 800px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent3)); } .scroll_wrap { background: var(--bg3); width: 800px; height: 600px; position: relative; overflow: auto; } .scroll_wrap .scroll_body { height: 2000px; } .scroll_wrap .scroll { position: fixed; top: 50%; left: 55%; font-size: 2rem; color: var(--accent3); transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }
